creator: fumifumi@abacustech.jp
text:
>>>>> Regarding Re: ports/190347: [patch] Add staging support to www/pivotx;
>>>>> Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> adds:

 > Maintainer of www/pivotx,
 > Please note that PR ports/190347 has just been submitted.

 > If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
 > you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
 > and a committer will take care of it.

 > The full text of the PR can be found at:
 > http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/190347

Hi,

Please go ahead, and commit them.

Thank you.
